title: Crispy Wonton Gyoza
description: A fusion of Egyptian and Asian flavors, these crispy wonton gyoza make for a delicious snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Wonton wrappers
ingredients.notes: available in most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: Gyoza filling
ingredients.notes: you can also make your own

ingredients.name: Egyptian spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of paprika, cumin, and coriander

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a small bowl, beat the eggs and mix with Egyptian spices and xtra crispy seasoning.
Place a wonton wrapper in the egg mixture and coat both sides evenly.
Place a tablespoon of gyoza filling in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Fry the gyoza until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
